name: companies-office-annual-return
description: Prepares your NZ Companies Office annual return — drafts the confirmation fields and flags anything that needs updating before you file.
longDescription: Every NZ company must file an annual return at the Companies Office once a year (free; the month is fixed at incorporation). This skill walks through the confirmation fields — registered address, directors, shareholders, ultimate holding company, AML status — using your prior return or last AGM minutes as the starting point. It produces a checklist of what's the same, what's changed, and what you should update on the Companies Office site before pressing submit. Does not file. Does not log into the Companies Office.
